title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUGHO IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF JAVIER.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 17148 / 62 OG No. 30, 5376 (July 25, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4365, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUGHO IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF JAVIER.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Bugho in the Province of Leyte is hereby changed to the Municipality of Javier.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
